name: topsec-waf-v3-262406-30229
description: OctoBus package for TopSec WAF v3.262406.30229 — authentication, IP black/white list, server policy, custom security rules, detection engine & rule status query.

waf.v1.WafAuthService/Login.name: login
waf.v1.WafAuthService/Login.description: Login to WAF 3.0 and cache the session.

waf.v1.WafIpGroupService/ShowIpGroups.name: list-ip-groups
waf.v1.WafIpGroupService/ShowIpGroups.description: List all IP black/white list groups.

waf.v1.WafIpGroupService/AddBlackIp.name: block-ip
waf.v1.WafIpGroupService/AddBlackIp.description: Add an IP or subnet to the blacklist. Use --scope global for all servers, or --scope none and --server-policy <name> for a specific site.

waf.v1.WafIpGroupService/AddWhiteIp.name: allow-ip
waf.v1.WafIpGroupService/AddWhiteIp.description: Add an IP or subnet to the whitelist.

waf.v1.WafIpGroupService/DeleteIpGroup.name: delete-ip-group
waf.v1.WafIpGroupService/DeleteIpGroup.description: Delete an IP group by name.

waf.v1.WafServerPolicyService/AddServerP.name: add-server-policy
waf.v1.WafServerPolicyService/AddServerP.description: Create a server policy and optionally bind an IP group.

waf.v1.WafCustomPolicyService/ShowCustom.name: list-custom-policies
waf.v1.WafCustomPolicyService/ShowCustom.description: List custom rules under a security policy.

waf.v1.WafCustomPolicyService/AddCustomP.name: add-custom-policy
waf.v1.WafCustomPolicyService/AddCustomP.description: Add a custom rule (IP block, URL filter, header matching). Variables: CLIENT_IP, REQUEST_METHOD, REQUEST_HEADERS, REQUEST_URI_RAW.

waf.v1.WafRuleService/ShowDefencePolicy.name: show-defence
waf.v1.WafRuleService/ShowDefencePolicy.description: Show which detection engine modules are enabled.

waf.v1.WafRuleService/ShowRuleActions.name: show-rule-actions
waf.v1.WafRuleService/ShowRuleActions.description: Show detection engine actions per rule type.

waf.v1.WafRuleService/ShowBuiltRules.name: list-rules
waf.v1.WafRuleService/ShowBuiltRules.description: List built-in rules. ruleType: built, core, app.

waf.v1.WafRuleService/SearchBuiltRules.name: search-rules
waf.v1.WafRuleService/SearchBuiltRules.description: Search rules by attack type or keyword.
